hooks.command: cd /path/to/project && npx tsc -b --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo '\n❌ TypeScript errors found. Fix them before building.'; exit 1; fi

hooks.prompt: A Bash command is about to run. ONLY act if the command contains 'drizzle-kit migrate' or 'drizzle-kit push'. In that case, read src/db/schema.ts and check that the schema looks intentional and safe (no accidental column drops or type changes). For all other commands return {"ok": true} immediately without reading any files.

hooks.command: cd /path/to/project && npx tsc -b --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '\n⚠️  TypeScript errors introduced. Please fix before continuing.'; fi; exit 0

hooks.prompt: A file was just edited. If the change adds direct database queries (Drizzle ORM calls or raw SQL) outside of src/app/actions.ts, return {"ok": false, "reason": "DB access must stay in src/app/actions.ts per project architecture"}. Otherwise return {"ok": true}.
